calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS, SEPT-06-2007: APPELLANT JENNIFER KIM APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR RESPONDENT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. APPELLANT JENNIFER KIM INFORMS THE COURT THE MATTER HAS SETTLED WITHIN THE PAST WEEK; THE MATTER IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR; THE COURT ISSUES AN ORDER DISMISSING THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).

PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT A. MYLES; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Continued To Sep-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Cause called for small claims appeal. Jerome Bellach appears as Respondent in Pro Per; Jennifer Kim appears as Appellant in Pro Per. Parties are sworn and present their respective cases in the narrative. Mr. Kim, Jennifer Kim's husband, is sworn as a witness and testifies on Ms. Kim's behalf.

EXH1(A) Binder of exhibits
9:45am - 9:50am
Parties take a break to discuss a possible settlement.
9:50am
Court reconvenes, all present.Parties agree to continue the matter to see if they are able to resolve it.
10:05am
The matter is continued to sep-06-07. If matter is not dismissed or resolved by then parties are ordered present.
10:25am
court adjourns, evidence is retained

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-08-2007 Continued To Jul-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Elliott A. Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Ms. Kathryn Bellach, Pro Per respondent for Bellach's Leather for Living, Inc. does not respond to roll call. She calls at 9:10am to say that her notice of appeal did not have a time on it, and requests a continuance. Jennifer Kim, Appellant, appears in Pro Per and responds to roll call. Mr. Kim is sworn.

Judge Myles speaks to Ms. Bellach by phone re her request for a continuance. Judge Myles advises Ms. Kim, the appellant, that she can refuse to have the case continued but would then be limited to presenting only her side of the argument, which might not be in her best interests.After speaking to both parties, the Court finds good cause to continue the matter. The case is continued to Jul-05-07, 9:00am, Dept. 525. Judge Myles will be the Pro Tem judge on that day and the stipulation for him as a Pro Tem Judge will stand, but will need to be signed by Ms. Bellach on Jul 5th. There will be no further continuances and if either party fails to appear the Court may impose monetary sanctions on the party who fails to appear.
No new evidence is submitted.

RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Set For Trial On May-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 622

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-10-2007 Continued To May-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
